reasoning: Emotional axis (60%): Strong pass. The candidate uses saturated pinks, teals, and whites in a bright, warm palette that clearly evokes the toy-diorama Hyrule mood. The central pink orb, teal/green ring, and white puff clouds read as cheerful and magical — not grim or scary. Round, friendly silhouette overall. Color saturation and warmth align well with EoW Zelda style. Score ~8.5/10 emotionally. Technical axis (40%): Solid pass. Zoomed views confirm 1px hard outlines with no visible anti-aliasing, clean pixel-grid snapping, and 2-3 tone hard shading per element (ring shows dark green / mid teal / blue highlight; orb shows pink / highlight; clouds show white / light shadow). Hand-pixeled character is evident. Minor issue: the radial symmetry of the ring reads slightly mechanical/computer-generated rather than hand-drawn, which slightly undercuts the hand-pixeled feel. Score ~7.5/10 technically. Denzi reference comparison: The reference sheet is a dark stone dungeon tileset — very different mood — but the teal magic portal elements within it confirm the hard-outline pixel style is correct. Candidate far exceeds reference in EoW emotional fidelity. Combined: (8.5×0.6)+(7.5×0.4)=5.1+3.0=8.1 → score 8, pass.
